title: pimelea notia
intro: Pimelea notia, also known as the woolly rice flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pimelea notia include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Pimelea notia include tea infusions and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
